query: SELECT p.id, p.titulo, p.cicloId, c.id as ciclo_id, c.nome, c.dataInicio, c.dataFim FROM pdis p LEFT JOIN ciclos c ON p.cicloId = c.id WHERE p.id = 510001;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.671da1035469 --database Uksxtg83ZJDkZPJL3fCmwT --execute SELECT p.id, p.titulo, p.cicloId, c.id as ciclo_id, c.nome, c.dataInicio, c.dataFim FROM pdis p LEFT JOIN ciclos c ON p.cicloId = c.id WHERE p.id = 510001;
